Tools Used
Framework Foundations
TOOLS USED
Below is a list of the tools we will be using inside of the campaign SOPs - please note
we are not affiliated or receive any kickbacks for these products, this is just what we
use.
Swydo - third party reporting (for client weekly reports)
Google Drive - houses all our campaign and client assets
Lucid Chart - for mapping out the funnel
Shopify - preferred ecommerce platform, super friendly with FB Ads
FB Audience Insights Plus - Chrome plugin to see which audiences are targetable
Pixel Tool Helper - to check is pixel is installed correctly
Screenflow - to record videos
Mark As Complete
